family_summary: Anti-colonial war fought mainly in French Algeria between the FLN/ALN and the French state. Violence shifted markedly across rural insurgency, massacre-reprisal episodes, urban terrorism/counterterror, border-barrier warfare, and late-war urban endgame violence.
notes: Episode-first DR research bundle. Only the Battle of Algiers police-power phase (ALGW-E4) is fully estimated. Core DR is left null under strict status rules because accessible direct-death numerators are not cleanly separable into civilian and organized-armed categories.
